volumeTitle: Casina. The Casket Comedy. Curculio. Epidicus. The Two Menaechmuses
label: Curculio (Section 5.3.724 - Section 5.3.729)

sections.label: Section 5.3.724
sections.original: Ego te vehementer perire cupio , ne tu me nescias .
sections.translation: I do most earnestly wish you may come to a bad end , so don ’ t misunderstand me [*] .

sections.label: Section 5.3.725b
sections.translation: I ’ faith , I really do so .

sections.label: Section 5.3.725c
sections.translation: I don ’ t misunderstand these fists of mine .

sections.label: Section 5.3.726b
sections.original: Quid tum , rogitas ? hisce ego , si tu me irritaveris ,
sections.translation: What then , do you ask ? With these same fists , if you provoke me , I ’ ll be making you quiet immediately .

sections.label: Section 5.3.727b
sections.translation: Well then , take this back at once .

sections.label: Section 5.3.728
sections.original: Tu , miles , apud me cenabis . hodie fient nuptiae .
sections.translation: Captain , you ’ ll dine with me ; the nuptials shall take place to-day .

sections.label: Section 5.3.729
sections.original: Quae res bene vortat mi et vobis . spectatores , plaudite .
sections.translation: May this matter turn out well for me and for yourselves .
